name: io.github.stabgan/openrouter-multimodal
description: Chat with 300+ LLMs via OpenRouter. Analyze and generate images, audio, and video from MCP.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key. Get one free at https://openrouter.ai/keys

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_DEFAULT_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Default model for chat + analyze tools. Defaults to nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl:free.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Sandbox root for save_path on generate_* tools. Defaults to the current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_MAX_TOKENS
environmentVariables.description: Default max_tokens for chat_completion when unset in the request.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_PROVIDER_IGNORE
environmentVariables.description: CSV of provider slugs to exclude.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_PROVIDER_ORDER
environmentVariables.description: JSON array or CSV of preferred provider IDs.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_PROVIDER_REQUIRE_PARAMETERS
environmentVariables.description: true/false. Require providers to support all request params.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_CACHE_RESPONSES
environmentVariables.description: Enable response caching server-wide. Sends X-OpenRouter-Cache: true on every chat/analyze call unless overridden per-request. Zero tokens billed on cache hits.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_INCLUDE_REASONING
environmentVariables.description: Enable reasoning tokens passthrough server-wide. Adds _meta.reasoning to chat_completion responses for DeepSeek R1 / Gemini Thinking / Opus 4.7.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key. Get one free at https://openrouter.ai/keys
